programme.title: Mas Selamat, The Fugitive Terrorist
programme.desc: The escape of an Indonesian-born Jemaah Islamiah terrorist sparked one of Singapore's largest manhunts, before he was finally found in Malaysia.

programme.title: E5 - My Sister's Keeper
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a 15-year-old boy who was gunned down after walking his younger sister home.

programme.title: E6 - Kids Who Kill - Kim Edwards & Lucas Markham
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: E11 - Angel (Part A)
programme.desc: Angel's life has spiralled as unchecked shopping habits have taken over her finances and her home. With reduced work hours but persistent spending, her home is now dangerously overcrowded.

programme.desc: From Taiwan to Singapore, addicted gamblers bet on anything and everything, with ruthless bookies using extortion to ensure payment.

programme.desc: Zoom In: Pay attention to current political topics, major social events and news hot spots. Dig out more facts and backgrounds. Analyze the early consequences of news events, the fate of characters, and present authoritative views.
Chief Editor's Time: Daily key issues around the world are discussed on Chief Editor's Time. In-depth analyses and discussion gives viewers a better understanding of the issue.
NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.

programme.title: E427 - Talk With World Leaders (III)
programme.desc: TALK WITH WORLD LEADERS: Talk With World Leaders reveals compelling insights into key international figures in the fields of politics, industry, business, science and the arts, giving Chinese audiences a closer look at the world leaders.

programme.title: The Logic Of The Many - The Swarm Principle
programme.desc: Researchers are investigating how animals behave in swarms. Their findings are being applied to robotics, logistics and new models of participation - and are opening up new perspectives for business and democracy.

programme.title: Women As Commodities - The Latin America Connection
programme.desc: Women in Latin America are recruited with brutal methods, then enslaved in Europe. A survivor recounts how she was lured to Spain with the promise of a job, then forced into prostitution.

E4 - Mvula's Journey
programme.desc: Mvula is the youngest calf in the Madzi family. Temperatures are soaring. Lagoons and waterholes are drying up. This forces Mvula and his family to undertake a long and dangerous journey to the only remaining source of water: the Luangwa River.

programme.title: E4 - Mvula's Journey
programme.desc: Mvula is the youngest calf in the Madzi family. Temperatures are soaring. Lagoons and waterholes are drying up. This forces Mvula and his family to undertake a long and dangerous journey to the only remaining source of water: the Luangwa River.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E6 - Crocodile Capers
programme.desc: Strap in for Dr. Amanda’s risky attempt to collar a wild roan antelope. Later, chase down blue monkey Indigo while unrest ensues among the vervets. Examine an eagle owl with bumblefoot and say adieu to Sheila the croc, who’s headed back to the wild.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of Volcanoes
programme.desc: Bask in the interconnected lives of wildlife shaped by volcanoes, forests, and seas. Take flight with rare Philippine eagles as they raise their young in an ancient tree, then dive into a river to catch a glimpse of the world’s rarest crocodile.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of Jungles
programme.desc: Plunge into crystal-clear seas to explore the Tubbataha Reef, which rests on an extinct underwater volcano where shallow lagoons shelter sea turtles and tiger sharks. Take flight with tarsiers as they hunt insects using powerful leaps between trees.

programme.title: E3 - The Young Ones
programme.desc: In this episode of Amazing Animal Friends a rescued orphaned rhino befriended by a playful dog and doting sheep, a big bunny rabbit that babysits boisterous baby lambs, and a porcupine that helps two English bulldogs rehabilitate injured animals.

programme.title: E1 - Queen of Yala
programme.desc: The shadowy forests of Yala National Park are the perfect hideout for secretive leopards. It’s time for one young female, Asha, to strike out alone. Join her as she fights for her own territory, finds a mate, and becomes a mother.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight

programme.title: E4 - South America
programme.desc: Learn how South America’s rich diversity of weather fuels an even richer diversity of life. Examine the Amazon rainforest’s oxygen-breathing trees, follow the arc of a vast cloud river, and meet flamingos that thrive in the sun’s scorching UV rays.

programme.desc: As gator season enters its final week, Troy attempts to train the next generation of Landry hunters. Ronnie calls upon Timmy's knowledge of secret honey holes to catch up on his tag count.

programme.title: E7 - Surviving The Impossible
programme.desc: Imagine free falling 30,000 feet without a parachute, or being buried alive and living to tell the tale. Or... what about getting trapped in a tiny room inside a sunken ship on the ocean floor...

programme.title: E19 - If The Shoe Phips
programme.desc: The Fellowship believes more than ever that they are finally zeroing in on treasure when they discover Oak Logs which may be part of the legendary platforms leading them to the Money Pit.

programme.title: E29 - Castle Scribbling
programme.desc: Whilst visiting a Castle, Sarah & Duck's drawings lead them to an exciting discovery.

programme.title: E46 - Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.desc: The Squirrels try the ultimate achievement of counting to 100 to earn their counting badge

programme.title: E18 - Carrot
programme.desc: Carrot sings about being trendy.

programme.title: E13 - Present
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'present', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E3 - Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E47 - Dunny
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E38 - Andy And The Flying Fox
programme.desc: Andy jets off in his safari-mobile to Australia in search of little red flying foxes. Along the way he meets a frilled lizard.

programme.title: E4 - Socks
programme.desc: It's laundry day in Playtime Towers, and Bella and Lift have washed everyone's socks. All they need to do now is find the matching pairs!

programme.title: E19 - The Art Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about different types of art and what inspires it.

programme.title: E18 - The History Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels get an interactive history lesson from Duggee and a host of famous faces.

programme.title: E29 - Mud Volcano, Azerbaijan
programme.desc: Glitch's plan to use methane gas from a mud volcano to power Lars's new machine has explosive results! Can the bickering pair stop a huge fire and save the Grimbots?

programme.desc: Rani Bharti, a simple homemaker whose life flips upside down when her husband, Bihar Chief Minister Bheema Bharti, survives an assassination attempt and makes her his successor

programme.title: E10 - The Drama Company
programme.desc: An eclectic mix of comedians explore who multiple genres of comedy. Starring Mithun Chakraborty as the ring master of a crew of highly misfit characters including Ali Asgar, Krushna Abhishek & others

programme.title: E48 - Tum Ho Naa-Ghar Ki Superstar
programme.desc: The show blends emotional storytelling with competitive gameplay, celebrating the intelligence, resilience and aspirations of women across India

programme.title: E3 - Operation Rhino: White Rhino Dehorning & Black Rhino GPS Tech Implant!
programme.desc: Coyote dehorns a white rhino and implants a GPS tracker into a rare black rhino!

programme.title: E4 - Entering the Wolf Den & Wild Deer Carcass Feeding Frenzy!
programme.desc: Coyote meets rescued foxes, then feeds a deer carcass to a pack of powerful gray wolves!

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E2 - Northern Territory
programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E3 - Operation Rhino: White Rhino Dehorning & Black Rhino GPS Tech Implant!
programme.desc: Coyote dehorns a white rhino and implants a GPS tracker into a rare black rhino!

programme.title: E4 - Entering the Wolf Den & Wild Deer Carcass Feeding Frenzy!
programme.desc: Coyote meets rescued foxes, then feeds a deer carcass to a pack of powerful gray wolves!

programme.title: E8 - Sarah and Sarah with James
programme.desc: Single Sarah is a Yukon newbie and has never bought a house before, so she enlists her skeptical friend, Sarah, to help her out.

programme.title: E3 - You Call That an Explosion?
programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

programme.title: E4 - Hot Rods and Speed Boats
programme.desc: The King Of The North drag race kicks off with Billy scrambling to prepare his hotrod for its race against Chris and the Jet Truck, in a challenge that will see the loser facing public humiliation.

programme.title: E1 - Central Australia
programme.desc: In this first episode, we showcase the best experiences on offer in Central Australia, also known as ‘The Red Centre.’ This ancient land is brimming with natural wonders and cultural significance. See Uluru at sunrise, experience life as a cattle farmer, learn about Australia’s rich indigenous history and walk the treacherous Larapinta Trail.

programme.desc: In Kakadu National Park, Andy joins Dewayne Webb foraging pandanus and cooking Seared Buffalo with Pandanus & Charred Herb Salsa over an open fire. He then heads to Darwin, assisting Zach Green at Elijah’s Kitchen, a food truck offering indigenous-inspired meals like Magpie Goose and Crocodile Laksa. Returning to Kakadu, Andy goes fishing with local Barramundi expert Rob Johnson and prepares Paperbark Leaf BBQ Barramundi with Sour Tamarind Sauce at Anbangbang Billabong, showcasing the region's environment and produce.

programme.title: E1 - Central Australia
programme.desc: In this first episode, we showcase the best experiences on offer in Central Australia, also known as ‘The Red Centre.’ This ancient land is brimming with natural wonders and cultural significance. programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

programme.desc: The King Of The North drag race kicks off with Billy scrambling to prepare his hotrod for its race against Chris and the Jet Truck, in a challenge that will see the loser facing public humiliation.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier and Virginie Jacobs show us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier and Virginie Jacobs show us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: E1850
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Angelo Dans La Foret Mysterieuse
programme.desc: Angelo, 10 years old, finds himself alone at a motorway rest area, forgotten by his parents. Without losing heart, he decides to cut through the forest. He then ventures into a mysterious territory populated by strange beings, threatened by an enemy even worse than the ogre of the region...

programme.title: Spoon
programme.desc: To escape everyday life and fulfill your dream, it's quite simple: you need a ladder and a spoon.

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express:2025-2026
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.title: Liar Liar

programme.desc: Ginormica, The Missing Link, Insectosaurous and B.O.B. join forces to fight back when aliens attack. Featuring Reese Witherspoon, Seth Rogen, Hugh Laurie and Will Arnett.

programme.desc: A luckless taxi dancer in New York City seeks a better life and finds love along the way.

Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: CNBC's ‘The Exchange' is the newsroom-based program for today's investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today's markets and investors. CNBC's deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money
programme.desc: “Fast Money” is America's post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, “Fast Money” breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.desc: CNBC's Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world's most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: It's one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. programme.title: Long And Winding Road
programme.desc: A story about two different men each finding their true meanings in life. LESLIE and TONY, two lower middle-class bachelors, are bosom friends. Leslie is a wandering soul who seems unable to settle down. He got fired and his girlfriend left him. Tony is a frustrating musician and a part-time worker at an elderly home. He doesn't like old people, but works there only to get close to his dream girl WAI...

programme.title: July Rhapsody
programme.desc: Secondary school teacher Lam Yiu-kwok is suffering from a mid-life crisis - his peers have all become more successful than him; his relationship with his wife, Chan Man-ching, is in trouble when her old flame returns, and he finds himself tempted by a 17-year-old student who has a crush on him...

programme.title: The Last Message
programme.desc: Our story begins in the Hang Seng Sanitarium, which has a quite amount of crazy people. Ah Tim is a handy man there and Li is a nurse. Ah Tim has the greatest enthusiasm in his work, especially when he combs through the remains of the deceased and divests them of worldly items like gold fillings. However, his enterprise is spotted by Li, therefore, he has to make it a profit sharing venture. Later on, with the arrival of old Cheng, big fortune comes too. The two is now planning seriously how to get all the valuables from the big guy. However...

programme.title: The Intellectual Trio
programme.desc: Taiwanese detective Simon visits Hong Kong and is served by Wing, the young and witty cop. Their adventures begin when they encounter two pretty girls, Pretty eyes and Slant eyes. These two girls are pickpockets and have stolen a jade from the professional killer. The killer is desperate to get back his treasure, that even though the detectives try to protect the sisters, the four are in great danger...

programme.title: E14 - Baby John's Birthday Blocks
programme.desc: Join Baby John for a day of birthday fun! He gets new building blocks, figures out the shapes of his presents, and has a messy party in the park. Plus, his sister Jill celebrates her birthday on a pink party bus!

programme.title: E9 - JJ's Birthday Party Fun
programme.desc: Get ready to party with JJ on his special day! The animals are setting up a surprise, but it's not going to plan. Enjoy a game of musical chairs, a party at the farm, a dino-themed birthday for Cody, and a magical birthday train ride!

programme.title: E7 - JJ's Birthday Celebration
programme.desc: It's the night before JJ's birthday and he is too excited to sleep! Join the fun with a game of musical chairs, a party at the farm with animal friends, and lots of special gifts. Will everything be ready in time for the big day?

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E3 -Let's Ride The School Bus!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers introduce the school bus! With stories and songs, we learn what it is, how it takes kids to school, and its fun features like wheels, wipers, and a horn! Learning is an exciting ride.

programme.title: The Melon Patch S1E4 -Feel Big Feelings!
programme.desc: Ms. Appleberry and the Melon Patch teachers navigate big feelings with stories and songs, helping kids recognize and name emotions like happy, angry, and sad. We learn that all feelings are okay, and that they can change too!

programme.title: E7 - Messy Guest, Cracked, Hoppy & Teddy!
programme.desc: The Minibods are dealing with a messy guest, a cracked egg, a hoppy friend & a ruined teddy! Jeff meets a cute but very messy Floofer & has to learn to live with his new friend's untidy habits. Then, Lulu finds a colorful egg, & when it cracks, a cute chick hatches that she doesn't want to let go! The challenges continue as Newt tries to nurse an injured Oddfrog back to health & Pogo feels guilty after accidentally ruining Newt's teddy bear-shaped hedge.

programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E3 - Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Join Blippi for some fun nature discoveries! First, he & D.BO dive to the ocean floor to help a forgetful island remember why it doesn't float away. Then, they shrink down for some smaller adventures! They help a firefly find a friend with the same blinking pattern, float high in the sky to learn how bubbles are made & join a group of ants on a mission to find out how they walk in such a straight line. The adventure is full of singing, science & new friends!

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: Zoom In
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom in takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: E15 - Cycling Itinerary
programme.desc: More and more tourists are looking for cycling, kayaking or horseback itineraries lasting one or several days. In the Ourthe-Vesdre-Ambleve region, in the province of Liege, Nathalie tries out a formula combining accommodation, heritage promotion and local products. All by bike!

programme.title: E18 - Valgaudemar, Guardians Of Memory
programme.desc: In the heart of the Ecrins massif, the Valgaudemar valley is often compared to a small Himalaya. It is wild, austere; winter heightens the feeling of solitude. Behind this apparent harshness, a deep memory endures. That of the elders, of lives shaped by the mountains and by isolation.

programme.title: E119
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E15 - Cycling Itinerary

programme.title: E7 - Hopes And Goals
programme.desc: Both expedition teams are in Italy for a new week of training. They experience their first night on a portaledge, suspended from the face of a steep wall. It is also time for the teams to define the goal of their final major expedition.

programme.title: House of Fury
programme.desc: A mysterious person arrived in his wheelchair in Yue's Clinic and asked for a person called Tai Chi Lung. Later on, Yue was found disappeared, leaving behind his clinic a mess...

programme.title: Wu Xia
programme.desc: Liu Jin-xi lives a seemingly normal life in a remote village. But his peaceful life is soon to be disrupted when a determined detective digs up his past.

programme.title: 12.12: THE DAY
programme.desc: After the assassination of President Park, martial law has been declared. A coup d'etat bursts out by Defense Security Commander CHUN Doo-gwang and a private band of officers following him. Capital Defense Commander LEE Tae-shin, an obstinate soldier who believes the military should not take political actions, fights against CHUN Doo-gwang to stop him. The conflict between the two grows while military leaders are holding their decision and Defense Minister is gone. In the midst of chaos, the spring of Seoul that everyone longed for heads to unexpected direction.

programme.title: Mommy Dearest
programme.desc: Two mothers, Emma and Olive, share love for sickly child Mookie. Birth mother Olive cares for her health, while maid Emma becomes her close friend - until Olive intervenes in their growing bond.

programme.title: Bubble Gang Fun Size
programme.desc: Features a collection of classic comedy sketches, parodies, and unforgettable moments from the iconic Filipino gag show.

programme.title: Day Off
programme.desc: A reality program that gives recognition to the most deserving and most hardworking Filipinos who toil through each day in order to earn a decent living for their families. The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

The hosts take turns substituting for the Day Off winner at work, while he or she enjoys a luxurious day of fun and relaxation with his or her family.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Saudi Arabia Snooker Masters 2025 -R16 - Murphy vs Williams
Saudi Arabia Snooker Masters 2025 -R16 - Chang vs O'Sullivan
E25
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: Maria By Callas

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 蒼梧國大將軍之女羲和遭滅門及暗算，重生為廢柴嫡女沈千夜。她懷著滿腔不甘踏上復仇之路，與疑似凶手的「小皇叔」裴夙糾纏不休。在調查真相的過程中，兩人從相互算計到聯手抗敵，揭開了蒼梧國隱藏的重重秘密。

programme.title: E63
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E63
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E4 - 姚弛回應劇中最愛謝可寅
programme.desc: 集結25位跨領域青春藝人，組建國內首個全明星流行表演合唱團「燃青團」；跳出傳統音樂真人秀的固化框架，不爭C位、不設淘汰，更關注合唱聲部，以團魂養成、情緒共振為核心，帶來全新觀看體驗；全景式記錄一群年輕人從陌生疏離到默契共生，從個體閃耀到集體綻放的熱血蛻變歷程。
